name: Calamari Ripieno Alla Griglia
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tentacles and clean calamari, leaving them as whole as possible. Set tentacles aside.
2. Place the calamari in an 8-quart pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat until quite tender (approximately one hour), then drain and cool.
3. Heat 4 tablespoons oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat until smoking. Add garlic and sundried tomatoes, cooking until light golden brown.
4. Add bread crumbs and continue cooking until well mixed and cooled slightly. Stir in thyme, scallions, and parsley.
5. Preheat the grill.
6. Stuff the cool calamari with the breadcrumb mixture and season with salt and pepper. Brush the stuffed calamari and tentacles with 1 tablespoon olive oil, then place on the grill.
7. Cook until nicely barbecued (about 10 minutes), turning once.
8. In a small mixing bowl, combine tomatoes, remaining oil, and chives; season with salt and pepper.
9. Remove calamari to a plate, top with spoonfuls of tomato sauce, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
